description_long: This object is a polygonal, shield-shaped barrel or bucket with a faceted, angular design. The main body is a deep brown color, bordered and reinforced by thick, dark gray bands that run horizontally across the front and around the edges. The structure appears to be made of a hard, possibly metallic or composite material, giving it a robust and industrial look. The side views reveal two integrated grip handles, also angular and matching the border material, suggesting ease of carrying or maneuvering. The surface is smooth with a matte to semi-gloss finish, and there are no visible labels, markings, or decorative elements. Its overall appearance suggests it is designed for durability and utility in urban or industrial environments.
description: A polygonal, shield-shaped barrel or bucket with dark gray reinforcements and integrated side handles, featuring a smooth brown body and robust industrial design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brown faceted body with three prominent horizontal dark gray bands and a thick border.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the object's thin profile and the angular integrated grip handle protruding from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the brown body and gray bands, but with less detail on the bands' depth.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the second integrated grip handle.
